message.content:
Explore how drag-and-drop is implemented in the Sidebar component. Look at:

1. src/components/Sidebar.tsx - Find the @dnd-kit implementation:
   - How DndContext is set up
   - How useSortable is used
   - The click-disable pattern during drags
   - How drag handles are implemented
   - The onDragEnd handler

2. Any context menu implementations in the app:
   - Right-click menus
   - Dropdown action menus
   - How they're positioned and triggered

3. src/stores/useFoldersStore.ts - Focus on:
   - createFolder action signature and usage
   - How folders can be nested (parentId)
   - The sortOrder field if present

Provide code snippets showing the patterns I should follow.
